scripts.android:expo:simulator: set NODE_ENV=development&& npx kill-port 8081 && npx expo prebuild --platform android --clean && npx expo run:android && npx expo start --tunnel
scripts.android:eas:development: set NODE_ENV=development&& npx expo prebuild --clean && eas build --platform android --profile development
scripts.android:eas:preview: set NODE_ENV=production&& npx expo prebuild --clean && eas build --platform android --profile preview
scripts.android:eas:production: set NODE_ENV=production&& npx expo prebuild --clean && eas build --platform android --profile production
scripts.android:eas:store: set NODE_ENV=production&& npx eas submit --platform android --profile production
scripts.ios:expo:simulator: set NODE_ENV=development&&  npx kill-port 8081 && npx expo prebuild --platform ios --clean && cd ios && pod install && cd .. && npx expo run:ios && npx expo start --tunnel
scripts.ios:eas:development: set NODE_ENV=development&& npx expo prebuild --clean && eas build --platform ios --profile development
scripts.ios:eas:preview: set NODE_ENV=production&& npx expo prebuild --clean && eas build --platform ios --profile preview
scripts.ios:eas:production: set NODE_ENV=production&& npx expo prebuild --clean && eas build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.ios:eas:store: set NODE_ENV=production&& npx eas submit --platform android --profile production
